channel.title: Salman Muqtadir
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Salman Muqtadir

item.title: This video has been deleted as a breach of agreement by the agency (Stackmist) w...
item.description: This video has been deleted as a breach of agreement by the agency (Stackmist) which runs under Asiatic. However brownfish media has no clash with the brand directly. The brand can contact agency for further explanation if required. We would like to clarify that our team holds no responsibility of what the agency has to say. We have received the advance payment and completed the deliverables. Hope there are no confusions. We have also black listed stackmist from any future work.
